item.name: Purusa Fish
item.description:
Living off the coast of Thavnair, these fish are capable of creating their own electrical currents.

[Suitable for printing on large canvases.]

fish.guide: The electric organ of the Purusa fish provides not only mesmerizing illumination, but also a means by which to stun distracted prey. Its energies call to mind the invigorating spirit that flows through all living things, whence its name derives.
